title: Senior Plant Manager at Siemens India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Siemens India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Siemens India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!
